description: Allowlist for scripts importing from @spec-kit/mcp-server/{lib,core,handlers} internals or equivalent relative runtime paths. Each exception requires: owner, reason, removeWhen, createdAt, lastReviewedAt. Wildcard internal-runtime entries MUST include expiresAt; specific-path entries SHOULD include expiresAt.

exceptions.reason: Benchmark needs direct access to internal metrics
CLI tool needs folder-discovery internals for description generation
Workflow memory-save updates per-folder description.json via dynamic import
CLI script needs direct access to entity extraction internals for rebuild operations
